# Graph Report - MediaHive App  (2026-06-09)

## Corpus Check
- 9009 files · ~6,886,367 words
- Verdict: corpus is large enough that graph structure adds value.

## Summary
- 157407 nodes · 167876 edges · 12460 communities (11235 shown, 1225 thin omitted)
- Extraction: 99% EXTRACTED · 1% INFERRED · 0% AMBIGUOUS · INFERRED: 1733 edges (avg confidence: 0.73)
- Token cost: 0 input · 0 output

## Graph Freshness
- Built from commit: `3dea368d`
- Run `git rev-parse HEAD` and compare to check if the graph is stale.
- Run `graphify update .` after code changes (no API cost).
